Home / Services / Ranch Fencing

Ranch Fencing

Rustic ranch fencing for acreage, livestock containment, and property definition.

For larger properties in and around El Paso, ranch fencing provides a practical and aesthetically pleasing solution for defining boundaries and containing livestock. L & D Fence Company specializes in installing durable and reliable ranch fencing that can withstand the demands of rural environments. We understand the importance of secure fencing for protecting your animals and property.

We offer a variety of ranch fencing options, including wood post and rail fences, wire mesh fences, and combination fences. Wood post and rail fences offer a classic and rustic look, while wire mesh fences provide added security for smaller animals. Our team will work with you to determine the best fencing solution for your specific needs and budget.

We use high-quality materials and expert installation techniques to ensure your ranch fence stands the test of time. We also offer gate installation services for easy access to your property. Ranch fencing is an essential investment for any property owner with acreage, providing both functionality and aesthetic appeal in the El Paso landscape.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Site Assessment – We evaluate your property and determine the optimal fence placement.
  2. 02 Step 2: Material Selection – Choose the fencing type and materials that best suit your needs.
  3. 03 Step 3: Professional Installation – Our team installs your ranch fence with precision and care.
  4. 04 Step 4: Quality Inspection – We ensure your fence meets our high standards for quality and durability.

Benefits

  • Property Definition
  • Livestock Containment
  • Rustic Aesthetic
  • Increased Security

Frequently Asked Questions

What type of fencing is best for horses?

Wood post and rail fences or wire mesh fences with top rails are excellent choices for horse containment.

How far apart should fence posts be?

Fence posts should typically be spaced 8-12 feet apart for optimal stability.

Do you offer gate installation services?

Yes, we offer gate installation services for all types of ranch fencing.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with ranch fencing? Contact us today.
